style_prompts.2d_western_cartoon: Speak with energetic curiosity and wonder, like a science communicator explaining amazing phenomena. Keep it engaging and accessible.
style_prompts.animals_nature: Speak with warmth and reverent awe, like David Attenborough narrating a nature documentary. Calm, unhurried, letting the beauty breathe.
style_prompts.true_crime: Speak with quiet gravitas and controlled tension. Measured, deliberate pacing — let silence do work. Never sensationalize.
style_prompts.history: Speak like a professional documentary narrator. Deep, authoritative, measured pace, serious gravitas. Build tension naturally through the script.
style_prompts.tech_gadgets: Speak with enthusiasm and clarity, like a tech reviewer who genuinely loves what they are discussing. Energetic but credible.
